commit.subject: LU-12583 build: Add server support for 4.15.0-55-generic
commit.message:
LU-12583 build: Add server support for 4.15.0-55-generic

This patch makes changes to allow server support for
Ubuntu 18.04.1/4.15.0-55-generic.

Signed-off-by: Shuichi Ihara <sihara@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I1a4d5c42a89557a437f5561f744053b5999e72e7
